task_completion.description: Verify that the Thunderbird application is open.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The main Thunderbird mail client window is visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: Verify that the agent has initiated the creation of a new feed account.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An 'Account Setup' tab or 'Feed Account Wizard' dialog is open, showing options to set up a 'Blogs & News Feeds' account.

task_completion.description: Verify that the 'Blogs & News Feeds' account has been successfully created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Blogs & News Feeds' account (or similarly named RSS account) is visible in the left folder pane of the Thunderbird main window.

task_completion.description: Verify that the Feed Subscriptions manager is open.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Feed Subscriptions' dialog window is open, which is used to add new RSS feed URLs.

task_completion.description: Verify that the correct RSS feed URL is entered into the subscription dialog.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The URL 'http://localhost:8080/market_news.xml' is typed into the 'Feed URL' input field within the Feed Subscriptions dialog.

task_completion.description: Verify that the feed was successfully added and its contents are displayed.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The feed is listed under the 'Blogs & News Feeds' account, and the headline 'Global Equities Rebound Strongly' is visible in the Thunderbird message list pane.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent used the Thunderbird graphical user interface to complete the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with Thunderbird's menus, dialogs, and buttons, rather than terminal commands editing Thunderbird profile configuration files directly.

integrity.description: Verify that the RSS feed is loaded inside Thunderbird, not a web browser.
integrity.visual_evidence: The headline 'Global Equities Rebound Strongly' appears within the Thunderbird application interface, not in Firefox, Chrome, or a text editor.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent did not simply type the expected headline into a text document to fake completion.
integrity.visual_evidence: The text 'Global Equities Rebound Strongly' is rendered as an email/feed item in Thunderbird's native message list UI, not in a generic text editor like gedit or nano.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected RSS feed URL is 'http://localhost:8080/market_news.xml'. The expected account type in Thunderbird is 'rss' (typically labeled 'Blogs & News Feeds'). When successfully subscribed, the feed will display the headline 'Global Equities Rebound Strongly'.
